data.title: aiPool founder: Two full-time staff are redesigning a custom AMM
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News aiPool founder skely posted on X: "I'm not a good 'developer', I'm not good at writing, and I'm not even a particularly good 'marketer'. What I'm really good at is discovering talented people. So if someone is worried about other projects. Don't worry, they are building their stuff @aipool_tee has 1-2 full-time developers, we are redesigning a custom AMM to stop grabbers, and our pre-sale activities will resume soon! @elizaOS has Shaw developing it, working 12 hours a day, and the whole team is working non-stop. The best thing I can do is to keep creating. If you don't like what I make, it's completely fair, please don't invest or buy it."

data.title: Hyperliquid’s 50x leveraged whale made over $16 million in profit in the past month
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid has made a profit of $16.39 million in the past month. 6 hours ago, the whale again went long on ETH and HYPE on Hyperliquid and made another profit of $1.18 million.
In the past month, the whale made a total of 8 transactions on Hyperliquid through 2 wallets, all of which were profitable, with a cumulative profit of $16.39 million.

data.title: pump.fun app adds chat feature
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News pump.fun posted on the X platform that its mobile application has added a chat function, allowing users to send private messages, create group chats, and seamlessly share token specific information.

data.title: Token Terminal: The number of contract deployments in the Base ecosystem hit a record high in the past week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Token Terminal published a post on the X platform disclosing data that the number of contracts deployed in the Base ecosystem hit a record high in the past week, with 11.4 million contracts deployed.

data.title: Base Ecosystem Achieves Record Contract Deployments
data.description: According to Odaily, Token Terminal shared data on the X platform revealing that the Base ecosystem reached a new milestone in contract deployments over the past week, with 11.4 million contracts deployed.

data.title: The crypto sector rebounded two days later and then fell, while the SocialFi and CeFi sectors remained relatively strong
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, the crypto sector rebounded two days later and then fell. Most sectors fell by about 1% to 3% in 24 hours, of which Bitcoin (BTC) fell by 2.77% and Ethereum (ETH) fell by 1.23%.
It is worth noting that the SocialFi and CeFi sectors are relatively strong. The SocialFi sector rose by 1.52% in 24 hours. Within the sector, Toncoin (TON) rose by 2.34%; the CeFi sector rose by 0.48%. Among them, Binance coin (BNB) rose by 1.49% in 24 hours due to factors such as Abu Dhabi investment company MGX's investment in Binance. At the same time, ssiSocialFi and ssiCeFi, which reflect the historical market conditions of the sector, rose by 3.20% and 0.67% in 24 hours, respectively, but the weekly returns were -5.66% and -3.22%, respectively.
In other sectors, the PayFi sector rose by 0.40%. Within the sector, XRP and Stellar (XLM) rose by 1.61% and 3.87% respectively; the Layer1 sector fell by 0.66%, the Meme sector fell by 1.44%, but OFFICIAL TRUMP (TRUMP) rose against the trend by 9.43%; the DeFi sector fell by 2.02%, and the Layer2 sector fell by 2.66%.

data.title: BTC rebounded and broke through 82,000 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 2.34%
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC rebounded and broke through 82,000 USDT, and is now reported at 82,011 USDT, with the 24-hour increase narrowed to 2.34%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: President of The ETF Store: BlackRock may apply for SOL and XRP spot ETFs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nate Geraci, president of The ETF Store, said on the X platform, "It is predicted that BlackRock will apply for SOL and XRP spot ETFs. The SOL application may be submitted at any time, and XRP is expected to proceed after the SEC lawsuit is over."

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 82,000 USDT with a Narrowed 2.23% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 14, 2025, 02:50 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 82,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 82,048.78125 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.23% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: BlackRock's Potential Plans for SOL and XRP Spot ETFs
data.description: According to Odaily, Nate Geraci, President of The ETF Store, shared on the X platform that BlackRock is expected to apply for SOL and XRP spot ETFs. The application for SOL could be submitted at any time, while the XRP application is anticipated to follow the conclusion of the SEC lawsuit.
